CustomField.description: Y a un soucis si ce n'est pas du gaz
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( TypePDE__c = 'C5', TECH_C5_4Postes__c , NOT(ISNULL(Puissance_souscrite__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_HPH__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_HCH__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_HPE__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_HCE__c))), '√', IF( AND( TypePDE__c = 'C5', TECH_MU_CU__c = 'CU', TECH_C5_4Postes__c = false, NOT(ISNULL(Puissance_souscrite__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_Base__c))), '√', IF( AND( TypePDE__c = 'C5', TECH_MU_CU__c = 'MU', TECH_C5_4Postes__c = false, NOT(ISNULL(Puissance_souscrite__c)), NOT(ISNULL(ConsoHC__c)), NOT(ISNULL(ConsoHP__c))), '√', IF( AND( TypePDE__c = 'Gaz', NOT(ISNULL(CARGaz__c))), '√', IF( AND( NOT(ISNULL(Puissance_souscrite__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_Pointe__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_HPH__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_HCH__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_HPE__c)), NOT(ISNULL(Conso_HCE__c))), '√','X' ) ))))
CustomField.label: PDE Conforme
